author: kat
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Render image previews below image links in Source mode.

manifest.author: Forrest
manifest.description: Render image previews below image links in Source mode.
manifest.name: Source Mode Inline Images

name: Source Mode Inline Images

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- Show image previews below image links in Source mode
- Support width syntax: ![[image.png|300]]
- Friendly error messages when image not found
- Does not affect Live Preview or Reading View

## Installation

See [README.md](https://github.com/hiforrest/source-mode-inline-images#installation) for installation instructions.

## Limitations

- Width must be a number in pixels
- Only works in strict Source mode
